title: June 21
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 21''' is the 172nd day of the year (173rd in leap years). There are 193 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Steve Niles]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 20|''Star Wars Weekly'' 20]] published.
*[[1994]] – [[Droids (1994) 3|''Droids'' (1994) 3]] is published.
*[[2000]] – [[Jedi Council: Acts of War 1|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 1]] published.
*2000 – ''[[Aurra's Song]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[A Night at Tosche Station]]'' published online.
*[[2006]] – [[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]] published.
*2006 – [[Rebellion 3|''Rebellion'' 3]] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Heir to the Empire|''Heir to the Empire: The 20th Anniversary Edition'']], including "[[Crisis of Faith]]," published.
*[[2016]] – [[The Best of Star Wars Insider Volume 2|''The Best of Star Wars Insider'' Volume 2]] published.
*2016 – "[[The Mines of Graballa]]" premiered on [[Disney XD]].
*2016 – [[Bespin]] DLC released for ''[[Star Wars Battlefront]]''.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 5|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 5]] published in the United States.
*[[2017]] – [[Darth Maul (2017) 4|''Darth Maul'' (2017) 4]] published.
*2017 – [[Darth Vader (2017) 2|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 2]] published.
*2017 – [[Poe Dameron Annual 1|''Poe Dameron Annual'' 1]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Boba Fett - The Bounty Hunter]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2022]] – [[Star Wars: Legion (book)|''Star Wars: Legion'']] published.
*2022 – ''[[The Mandalorian: Grogu's Journey]]'' published.
*2022 – [[Stories of Jedi and Sith (audiobook)|''Stories of Jedi and Sith audiobook'']] released.
*[[2023]] – [[Bounty Hunters 35|''Bounty Hunters'' 35]] published.
*2023 – [[The Mandalorian Season 2 1|''The Mandalorian Season 2'' 1]] published.
*[[2024]] – "[[Nubs Tries to Meditate]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
<noinclude>
